title: Add Declaration Section with English & Hindi Text and Acknowledgement Checkbox

requirements.text: Create or update the GuardianDeclarationSection component to display both the English and Hindi versions of the declaration text, stacked vertically (English first, then Hindi), followed by a checkbox for the parent/guardian to acknowledge and agree to the declaration. The English text is: "All the information given by my son/daughter in this form and all the certificates attached are true. If found false, the school administration will have the right to take all legal action. I will not appeal against this. My son/daughter will follow the orders, instructions and rules issued by the school administration. If this is not done, the school administration will be free to expel the student. The school administration will not be responsible for getting or not getting government benefits. 75% attendance is mandatory and must be present in the school uniform (dress)". The Hindi text is: "मेरे बेटे/बेटी द्वारा इस फॉर्म में दी गई सभी जानकारी और संलग्न सभी प्रमाण पत्र सत्य हैं। यदि असत्य पाया गया तो विद्यालय प्रशासन को सभी कानूनी कार्रवाई करने का अधिकार होगा। मैं इसके विरुद्ध अपील नहीं करूँगा/करूँगी। मेरा बेटा/बेटी विद्यालय प्रशासन द्वारा जारी आदेशों, निर्देशों और नियमों का पालन करेगा/करेगी। यदि ऐसा नहीं किया गया, तो विद्यालय प्रशासन छात्र को निष्कासित करने के लिए स्वतंत्र होगा। सरकारी लाभ मिलने या न मिलने के लिए विद्यालय प्रशासन जिम्मेदार नहीं होगा। 75% उपस्थिति अनिवार्य है और विद्यालय की वर्दी (ड्रेस) में उपस्थित रहना आवश्यक है।". The checkbox label should read: "I / We have read and agree to the above declaration" (in English) and "मैंने/हमने उपरोक्त घोषणा पढ़ी है और सहमत हैं" (in Hindi), both visible. The checkbox state must be tracked in the form state.

quotes: All the information given by my son/daughter in this form and all the certificates attached are true...

the Declaration section should be appear at the end of the form, also English and Hindi declarations be displayed, also a checkbox field for the parent/guardian to acknowledge/agree to the declaration

acceptanceCriteria: The Declaration section appears as the last section of the admission form, after all other sections including Parent's Details.
The English declaration text is displayed in full and clearly readable.
The Hindi declaration text is displayed in full beneath the English text, using a font that correctly renders Devanagari script.
A checkbox is present below both texts with labels in both English and Hindi.
The checkbox state is tracked in the form and can be toggled by the user.
The section is visually consistent with other form sections (card layout, matching styling).

requirements.text: Integrate the GuardianDeclarationSection into AdmissionFormPage.tsx so it renders as the final section of the multi-section admission form. Wire the declaration checkbox value into the form state object. The form submission should not be blocked solely by this checkbox (it is an acknowledgement field, not a hard validation gate), but its value should be included when saving draft or submitting.

quotes: the Declaration section should be appear at the end of the form

acceptanceCriteria: The Declaration section is the last visible section when scrolling through the full admission form.
The checkbox value is included in the form data object passed to save-draft and submit actions.
No existing form sections are displaced or removed.
The section is rendered correctly in both enabled and disabled (submitted) form states.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter or remove any existing form sections or their field logic.
Preserve the existing GuardianDeclarationSection filename if it already exists; update it in place.
nonGoals: Making the declaration checkbox a hard required validation that blocks form submission.
Adding any new backend fields or schema changes for the declaration checkbox.
Translating any other part of the form into Hindi.
Changing the placement or order of any existing form sections.
